creator: dufresnep@zoho.com
text:
I might be confused... package description says there is a acms command to run the server, but pkg-files does not seems to list it.

When ran, under XFCE (14.0-Current), it hang, not opening any window.

Pressing Ctrl-C or Ctrl-D does not help... have to kill -9 [process id] to kill it.
